items.title: Java News Roundup: GraalVM Build Tools, EclipseLink, Spring Milestones, Open Liberty, Quarkus
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: GraalVM Build Tools, EclipseLink, Spring Milestones, Open Liberty, Quarkus. This week's Java roundup for March 23rd, 2026, features news highlighting: GA releases of GraalVM Native Build Tools 1.0 and EclipseLink 5.0; the

items.title: FOSDEM 2026: Intro to WebTransport - the Next WebSocket?!
items.summaryShort: FOSDEM 2026: Intro to WebTransport - the Next WebSocket?!. Max Inden recently explored in a talk at FOSDEM 2026 how the upcoming WebTransport protocol and Web API enhance WebSocket capabilities.

items.title: Google Unveils AppFunctions to Connect AI Agents and Android Apps
items.summaryShort: Google Unveils AppFunctions to Connect AI Agents and Android Apps. In a move to transform Android into an "agent-first" OS, Google has introduced new early beta features to support a task-centric model in which apps provide functional build

items.title: Kubescape 4.0 Brings Runtime Security and AI Agent Scanning to Kubernetes
items.summaryShort: Kubescape 4.0 Brings Runtime Security and AI Agent Scanning to Kubernetes. Version 4.0 of the open source Kubernetes security platform Kubescape has been released, bringing runtime threat detection and a new set of AI-era security features.

items.title: Nuxt Test Utils v4: Vitest v4 Requirement, Mocking Overhaul and Stricter Environment Setup
items.summaryShort: Nuxt Test Utils v4: Vitest v4 Requirement, Mocking Overhaul and Stricter Environment Setup. Nuxt Test Utils has released version 4.0.0, which primarily integrates Vitest v4.

items.title: The Pixel 10a doesn't have a camera bump, and it's great
items.summaryShort: The Pixel 10a doesn't have a camera bump, and it's great. The Google Pixel 10a can lay flat on a table, but otherwise the company hasn't brought a ton of upgrades to its newest budget smartphone.

items.title: YouTube CEO says the best YouTubers will ‘never leave their home’
items.summaryShort: YouTube CEO says the best YouTubers will ‘never leave their home’. CEO Neal Mohan insisted that he isn’t worried about Netflix luring away YouTube's most popular creators.

items.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ becomes Amazon MGM’s biggest box office hit
items.summaryShort: ‘Project Hail Mary’ becomes Amazon MGM’s biggest box office hit. Amazon’s bet on “Project Hail Mary” has paid off handsomely.
